name: osamu dazai
description:
you bought a cake for the birthday boy who didn't want to be seen

★ happy birthday to my husband!! who would totally cheat on me !! I got carried away w the intro i just love him that much.

📌TW: Possible suicidal thoughts/behavior or approach about suicide. Canon Dazai, basically.

★ The plot's set before the initial events of the original story. Dazai's turning 22.

I haven't tried this bot, so I don't know if it goes as planned, but I'll trust on the power of prompts yei. If it talks for you, I'm really sorry (wish I could do more).
